import chess, chess.engine
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
print(board)
print('legal moves', board.legal_moves.count())
engine = chess.engine.SimpleEngine.popen_uci('/usr/games/stockfish')
for t in [0.1,0.5,1.0,3.0]:
    result = engine.play(board, chess.engine.Limit(time=t))
    info = engine.analyse(board, chess.engine.Limit(time=t))
    print('time', t, 'move', result.move.uci(), 'score', info['score'])
engine.quit()

import chess, chess.engine
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
print(board)
print('is_valid', board.is_valid())
print('is_check', board.is_check())
print('legal', board.legal_moves.count())
engine = chess.engine.SimpleEngine.popen_uci('/usr/games/stockfish')
for t in [0.1,0.5,1.0,3.0]:
    res = engine.play(board, chess.engine.Limit(time=t))
    info = engine.analyse(board, chess.engine.Limit(time=t))
    print('time', t, 'move', res.move.uci(), 'score', info['score'])
engine.quit()

import chess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
print(board)
mates=[]
checks=[]
for mv in board.legal_moves:
    b=board.copy()
    b.push(mv)
    if b.is_checkmate():
        mates.append(mv.uci())
    elif b.is_check():
        checks.append(mv.uci())
print('mates', mates)
print('checks', checks)

import chess, chess.engine
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
engine = chess.engine.SimpleEngine.popen_uci('/usr/games/stockfish')
info = engine.analyse(board, chess.engine.Limit(depth=18), multipv=5)
for i,entry in enumerate(info,1):
    pv = entry.get('pv', [])
    print(i, entry['score'], pv[0].uci() if pv else None)
engine.quit()

import chess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
with open('/app/move.txt') as f:
    moves=[line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]
print('moves_in_file', moves)
for u in moves:
    mv=chess.Move.from_uci(u)
    print(u, 'legal', mv in board.legal_moves, end=' ')
    b=board.copy(); b.push(mv)
    print('checkmate', b.is_checkmate())
PY
moves_in_file ['e2e4', 'g2g4']
e2e4 legal True checkmate True
g2g4 legal True checkmate True
